# Youngmin Cho — Data Scientist
> Personal portfolio and technical blog by Youngmin Cho (Paul Cho), a data scientist building AI-powered tools.

## About
Youngmin Cho is a data scientist specializing in AI/ML, NLP, and autonomous data pipelines. This site showcases projects, technical writing, and professional background.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://www.chopaul.com/): Portfolio overview with featured project and recent writing
- [About](https://www.chopaul.com/about): Background, skills, and current focus
- [Blog](https://www.chopaul.com/blog): Technical writing on data science, AI, and ML
- [Resume](https://www.chopaul.com/resume): Professional experience, education, and skills
- [Projects](https://www.chopaul.com/projects/araverus): Araverus — story-first financial intelligence platform

## Key Facts
- Specializes in LLM integration, embedding pipelines, and financial data analysis
- Built Araverus: an autonomous financial news threading platform using Gemini, GPT-4o-mini, and embedding models
- Tech stack includes Python, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, and various LLM APIs
- Contact: choym92@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/choym92
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ympcho/
